text: Job hunting is the same work, over and over. DevJobInfo takes that part off your hands.
Everything lands on one dashboard — jobs found, your match rate, and where every application stands.
Plus how your match scores are spread, so you know you're aiming at the right roles.
It all rests on your profile. Drop in your CV, and it fills itself in.
Search five job boards at once — or paste a job URL straight in.
Every job is scored against your profile. And a thin posting gets capped, never oversold.
Then a cover letter, written from your real history, in the language of the posting.
Nothing invented — only what's actually in your profile.
Add your motivation for the role.
And a resume tailored to this job, reordered around what this employer asked for.
Both download as PDFs, ready to send.
